scenario.name: OPTIONS test
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:kamailio@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
